privileged_info_summary: Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b is a real, open-source restaurant point-of-sale system (available at https://sourceforge.net/projects/floreantpos/ and https://floreant.org/) released under MRPL 1.2 license. The task uses a pre-populated Apache Derby demo database with 100+ menu items. Three existing menu items require price updates: HAMMER COFFEE from $2.00 to $3.75 (Menu Item ID 25, HOT DRINKS group), SMK HOUS B FAST from baseline $7.99 to $10.50, and OLD TIMER B FAST from baseline $6.99 to $9.75. The agent must also create a new PREMIUM SELECTIONS menu category and add three new items: WAGYU BEEF BURGER at $24.95, TRUFFLE FRIES at $12.95, and ARTISAN CHEESE PLATE at $18.50. Back Office access requires PIN 1111 and features an ENTER SECRET KEY dialog (bypassed by leaving field empty and clicking OK). The environment has a 600-second timeout, 80-step maximum, Apache Derby with pre-configured database backup/restore, OpenJDK 11, and GNOME desktop at 1920×1080 resolution.
